title: Counter-Clock World
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A novel set in a world where time has begun moving backwards: the dead rise from their graves, people grow younger, and food is un-eaten. Originally published in 1967, this Mariner Books/Houghton Mifflin Harcourt edition () preserves one of Dick's most conceptually playful explorations of entropy and temporal reversal.

assets.path: PaulPKDarchive/PKDpdf/Dick, Philip K - Counter-Clock World (2012, Mariner Books_Houghton Mifflin Harcourt) - libgen.li.epub
